query:
SELECT 
  awayTeam, homeTeam,
  ROUND(modelAwayScore, 3) AS modelAwayScore,
  ROUND(modelHomeScore, 3) AS modelHomeScore,
  ROUND(modelAwayScore + modelHomeScore, 3) AS modelCombinedGoals,
  modelTotal,
  ROUND(modelOverRate, 2) AS modelOverRate,
  ROUND(modelUnderRate, 2) AS modelUnderRate,
  modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  ROUND(modelAwayWinPct, 2) AS modelAwayWinPct,
  ROUND(modelHomeWinPct, 2) AS modelHomeWinPct,
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  spreadEdge, totalEdge, mlEdge,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(modelRunAt/1000) AS modelRunAt
FROM games
WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-14' AND sport = 'NHL';
